channels.name: Dan Martell
channels.description:
My #1 passion is teaching.

#2 is building AI businesses.

I’ve built and exited 3x tech companies.

Invested in 100+ others.

Spend 98.2% of my time building AI startups at Martell Ventures (AI Venture Studio)

Wrote a WSJ best selling book https://www.BuyBackYourTime.com

Play life full out (wake surfing, snowboarding, mountain biking) at the highest level…

… and I love people and travelling the world with my family training and speaking on the biggest stages.

Oh, and did all that after ending up in jail and rehab at 17 years old.

It’s been a journey to say the least.

AI를 가지고 '만드는 것'을 좋아하는 디자이너입니다.
기업과 스타트업씬에 실제로 통용되는 AI를 다루고 있어요.

현재 SK 등의 대기업들과 사내 AI 자동화 및 전환을 위한 프로젝트 12건 진행하고 있습니다.
프로젝트나 강의 제안이 있다면 언제든 문의주세요.

이전엔 SK텔레콤에서 '에이닷', 'T전화' 프로덕트 디자인을 담당했어요.
'조쉬의 뉴스레터'로 IT 필드에서 이름을 알렸어요.

강의, 협업, 컨설팅 등 다양한 협업이 열려있습니다.

⚬ 전 SK텔레콤 출신 프로덕트 디자이너

channels.name: The AI Automators
channels.description:
We're Alan and Daniel Walsh, two brothers teaching you how to build production-grade AI agents and systems that actually survive real-world use.

Most AI content online is incredibly surface-level. We go deeper. With 30+ years of combined experience designing software for real businesses, we cover the stuff that actually matters in production: retrieval at scale, agent harnesses, deployment, security, and architecture decisions that hold up.

Expect deep dives on AI agents and frameworks, agentic RAG, Claude Code + coding harness, n8n, and the full stack behind serious AI applications.
